name: geo-mining-research
description: Academic geoscience/mining research workflows with routing and evidence synthesis across GIS, geochemistry, mineral occurrences, deposit models, and Canadian disclosure boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: GIS, geochemistry, and mining research synthesis for Canada-first workflows.
interface.longDescription: Routes open-ended geoscience and mining research questions to focused skills, normalizes AOIs, commodities, deposit models and jurisdictions, preserves source provenance, and produces evidence-backed Markdown research briefs with Canadian NI 43-101 and CIM terminology boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Screen a BC AOI for porphyry Cu-Mo evidence.
Evaluate an Ontario claim block for LCT pegmatite potential.
Review NI 43-101 terminology and evidence gaps.
